sections.paragraph:
Original: מלאכי

Transliteration: mal'âkı̂y

Phonetic: mal-aw-kee'

BDB Definition:

Malachi = "My messenger"
  1. the prophet who wrote the last book of the Old Testament; nothing else is known

Origin: from the same as H4397

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
